utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items, each with sufficient detail and cost breakdowns. Health coverage specifies physical and mental health with costs, property coverage specifies home/contents with costs, travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs, additional services are listed with costs, and total_budget gives a complete monthly/annual breakdown. All required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan specifies that all major coverages (health, property, and travel) are included under 'InsurePlus Standard Plan3'. Based on the ground-truth ratings, there is no 'Plan3' variant, but the only relevant match is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for health and travel, and 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' for property. For health coverage, both physical and mental components are bundled in the same plan, which correspond to the InsurePlus Standard Plan ratings under 'primary_health_coverage'. The additional services listed—telemedicine, wellness programs, concierge services—match the items under 'health_enhancement_services' and 'travel_enhancement_services'. The telemedicine and wellness programs are clearly listed with their ratings, and concierge services are also present in the travel enhancement section.

final_package_text:

    "property_coverage": "Home/contents insurance with electronics and liability protection included in InsurePlus Standard Plan3 - estimated €75/month (covers personal belongings and adventure equipment protection)", 
    "travel_coverage": "Travel insurance with global coverage, medical evacuation, and adventure sports coverage included in InsurePlus Standard Plan3 - estimated €30/month (24/7 emergency coordination, specialized rescue services)",
    "additional_services": "24/7 emergency support, global assistance, telemedicine, wellness programs, concierge services - estimated €10/month",
    "total_budget": "€315/month total (€3,780 annually) representing €135/month savings (€1,620 annual savings) compared to current €450/month (€5,400 annually) multi-provider setup"
